data.title: Circle Won't Freeze Stolen USDC Without Court Order, CEO Points Out
data.description: Jeremy Allaire, CEO of Circle Internet (NASDAQ: CRCL), announced that the company implements a Court-Order-Only Policy when it comes to freezing USDC wallets. Allaire stated that Circle only takes such action when directed by law enforcement or courts. This declaration led to a 9% surge in shares. During a press conference in Seoul, Allaire emphasized that USDC is considered a regulated financial product, not a tool for immediate intervention in hacking situations. He highlighted that Circle strictly adheres to legal processes and refrains from independent decisions to freeze wallets in the event of an exploit; they wait for formal requests from authorities. In contrast, rival Tether, issuer of the largest stablecoin (CRYPTO: USDT), has a more proactive approach by freezing funds related to hacks within hours. Tether differs significantly in its handling of such situations compared to Circle.

data.title: AHF, UNITE Convene High-level Roundtable on Health Financing during IMF/World Bank Spring Meetings
data.description: In Washington, the AIDS Healthcare Foundation (AHF) Global Public Health Institute and UNITE Parliamentarians Network for Global Health are set to host a high-level parliamentary roundtable dialogue titled Financing Health Equity and Security on April 14. The event will run concurrently with the 2026 Spring Meetings of the International Monetary Fund and World Bank Group and will serve as a breakfast side event. This important gathering will bring together parliamentarians, global health leaders, and key stakeholders to discuss crucial topics.

data.title: 'ECHL Unfiltered: South Carolina Stingrays' Earns Regional Emmy® Nomination
data.description: GameAbove Entertainment's recent release of the hockey docuseries, ECHL Unfiltered: South Carolina Stingrays, indicates a growing interest in high-quality sports narratives. The latest installment, produced by GameAbove Entertainment, has caught the attention of viewers. The docuseries provides an in-depth look at the South Carolina Stingrays and their journey. This signals a surge in demand for premium sports storytelling. The release took place on April 13, 2026, in Fort Myers, Florida. With a focus on access and exclusive behind-the-scenes content, the docuseries offers viewers a unique perspective on the team. This reflects a shift towards more immersive and engaging sports content.

data.title: Sedgwick launches new 24/7 Accident Response Team to transform commercial trucking claims
data.description: A recent service introduced involves deploying on-scene adjusters promptly for early intervention, immediate documentation, and smooth claims coordination. Sedgwick, a top risk and claims administration company, unveiled its new program, the Accident Response Team in Memphis, Tennessee on April 13, 2026. This initiative aims to provide quick and efficient assistance, enhancing the claims process.

data.title: Kemin Introduces EDIE™ Generation 2 Application System
data.description: A company based in Des Moines, Iowa, has made significant strides in implementing smart water disinfection systems for livestock and poultry operations across the United States. Kemin Industries, a renowned global ingredient manufacturer, is leading the charge towards sustainable practices in enhancing the quality of life for a significant portion of the global population. This initiative aims to introduce advanced water disinfection methods to improve the environmental impact and efficiency of livestock and poultry operations throughout the country. The project signifies a promising development in the agriculture sector, as the company continues to innovate and positively influence 80 percent of the world's population.

data.title: Greenspoon Marder Expands Los Angeles Office with the Addition of 10 New Attorneys
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Greenspoon Marder revealed a noteworthy growth in its Los Angeles branch by welcoming 10 attorneys from Resch Polster & Berger LLP. Resch Polster & Berger LLP, a distinguished boutique law firm in Southern California recognized for its advanced business practices, contributed to Greenspoon Marder's expansion in Los Angeles.

data.title: JACK LONDON SQUARE LAUNCHES MULTI-WEEK 'ART OF KINDNESS' CELEBRATION TO BRING COMMUNITY TOGETHER THROUGH SHARED CONNECTION
data.description: On May 9th, a program will conclude with a free event in Oakland, California, where guests are encouraged to express gratitude and come together through acts of kindness. The event will take place at Jack London Square, a prominent location in the Bay Area known for dining, recreation, and commercial activities. Located at www.jacklondonsquare.com, Jack London Square is hosting this event to promote positivity and connection among attendees. This initiative aims to foster a sense of gratitude and community spirit, emphasizing the importance of kindness in daily interactions. Don't miss this opportunity to join in the celebration on May 9th.

data.title: Why Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Could See An Explosive Move In April
data.description: The odds of Dogecoin hitting $0.10 this month on Polymarket are currently at 59%, while Shiba Inu saw a 119% surge in burns within 24 hours as both meme coins move toward significant changes. Dogecoin has seen a 1% increase, maintaining close to the $0.09 mark. A wedge has formed between the descending upper trendline and the rising lower boundary, with the price currently at the apex. There are possibilities of DOGE breaking above $0.10240 in the next few days or dropping to $0.080. The SAR indicator turned bullish at $0.08881, marking the first clear daily bullish sign in months. Options trading activity saw a significant increase of 256%, reaching $174.68. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Seer receives unsolicited proposal and director nominations from Radoff-JEC Group.
data.description: In recent data released, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. This marks a significant improvement from the previous month, where the rate was at 5.2%. The statistics also revealed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter, showing strong growth and indicating a positive outlook for the job market. Additionally, the report highlighted a rise in average hourly wages by 3.7% compared to last year. Overall, these figures point towards a robust and flourishing economy, with more people finding employment opportunities and experiencing wage growth.

data.title: MONTCLAIR PLACE LAUNCHES MULTI-WEEK 'ART OF KINDNESS' CELEBRATION TO BRING COMMUNITY TOGETHER THROUGH SHARED CONNECTION
data.description: Montclair Place, a prominent shopping, dining, and entertainment destination in the Inland Empire, will host a free event on May 16th, 2026. The event aims to bring people together to express gratitude and foster connections through acts of kindness. The program, culminating in this event, invites guests to participate in spreading positivity. Residents can join in the celebration by sharing their experiences and connecting with others. This initiative seeks to promote unity and strengthen the community. Don't miss this opportunity to be part of a collective effort in Montclair.
